name: ashlr
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin — 40 MCP tools in a single consolidated MCP process (Read/Grep/Edit/MultiEdit/Ask/SQL/Bash/Tree/HTTP/Diff/Logs/Orient/PR+Issue/Glob/WebFetch/DiffSemantic/EditStructural/Test + genome tools), hybrid LLM summarization (hosted Pro cloud → Anthropic Haiku 4.5 → ONNX offline → local opt-in), GitHub OAuth sign-in, cross-machine stats sync (Pro), cloud genome sync (Pro/Team), eager corpus warm-start RAG for small projects (no manual init), PreToolUse redirect hooks (ASHLR_HOOK_MODE), per-session token accounting, animated status line, shareable SVG savings badge. MIT, zero telemetry on free tier.
